title: Streamlit Explorer: Visual Filter (WHERE Clause) Builder
story: As a data analyst, I want to visually build filter conditions for my Snowflake queries so that I can narrow down data results without writing WHERE clauses in SQL.
description:
Add the filter (WHERE clause) portion of the visual SQL builder accordion in the Streamlit Explorer. This is the second clause builder after ORDER BY.

This feature is prioritized because once filtering is complete, the app is ready for a beta release to customers like Fundcanna for feedback. The accordion UX pattern follows the same approach as the ORDER BY builder.

GROUP BY will be implemented as a separate ticket (MBT-1198).
acceptance_criteria: User can add filter conditions using the accordion UI
User can select a field, operator, and value for each filter condition
Multiple filter conditions can be combined
Generated SQL reflects the WHERE clause with all filter conditions
Query results are filtered according to the configured conditions
Accordion UX is consistent with the ORDER BY builder pattern
ux_changes: Accordion-style WHERE clause builder with field selector, operator picker, value input, and multi-condition support. Consistent with the ORDER BY accordion UX pattern.
middleware_changes: SQL generation logic to construct WHERE clauses from user-defined filter conditions. Condition combining with AND/OR operators.
implementation_notes: This feature, combined with ORDER BY and data preview, constitutes the beta-ready version of the Streamlit Explorer. GROUP BY is deferred to a separate ticket (MBT-1198).
comment_summary: No comments. Ticket in To Do status.
